cruz-monica.text: Monica De La Cruz (Republican) is the current officeholder running for U.S. Representative, TX-15.
As of 2026-07-04, FEC records show Monica De La Cruz had raised $4,240,747 and spent $2,520,271 for this campaign.

On 7-Jan-2025, Monica De La Cruz voted Yea on H R 29. A Yea vote required federal detention of unauthorized immigrants charged with theft, burglary, larceny, or assaulting a law enforcement officer, and let state attorneys general sue the federal government over certain immigration enforcement decisions.

base.summary: This is the U.S. House race for TX-15. In the most recent election (2024-11-05), Monica De La Cruz (REP) won by about 14.15 points out of 223769 votes cast. The bullets below summarize each current candidate's public finance and voting-record data where available.
caveats: This summary only includes facts found in our sourced dataset (FEC finance filings and U.S. House Clerk roll-call votes). It omits anything we could not verify from those sources.
No public data in our set on any candidate's policy positions for this race (the positions field was empty for every candidate as of this build).
No public data in our set on Monica De La Cruz's policy positions.
